evidence: script scrutiny found 171 summary_only_write_risk findings and 14 default_write_with_summary_only findings
repo index rebuild and script-import rebuild write tracked receipts/summaries/checkpoints that can immediately dirty freshness checks
manual line evidence index_self_invalidation and network_default_write_review
global_findings.fix_direction: Introduce explicit --write/--rebuild writer intent and make --summary-only/status/query paths pure read-only unless the command name is a generator and --write is present.
global_findings.impact: Research operators cannot reliably run low-token/status/audit commands without risking dirty tracked artifacts or stale-index noise.
global_findings.title: Summary-only and query/status paths are still not consistently read-only

evidence: 83 scripts are missing from the helper manifest
49 current scripts are unclassified in script surface policy
checkpoint shows every VBT API lane has strong helper-manifest gaps and summary-write risks
global_findings.fix_direction: Regenerate or repair reference/repo_helpers and configs/v2/script_surface_usage_policy from the script import architecture index, then validate with cookbook/import validators.
global_findings.impact: Automation cannot tell which helpers are active, archived, query-only, generator-only, live-capable, or safe to dispatch.
global_findings.title: Helper manifest and script surface policy lag behind the actual repo-assist surface

evidence: VBT MCP shows Data supports download/fetch/pull/run/update and CSV/parquet/SQL/DuckDB/ArcticDB IO
checkpoint Data lane reports 52 VBT642 records, all P0 runtime-sensitive reference-only with operator decision required
repo has working materializers, but native VBT Data affordances are not activated through a configured repo-owned acquisition mode
global_findings.fix_direction: Add config-first acquisition routes that map source_registry/provider roles to VBT Data-compatible load/fetch/update surfaces, with explicit live/historical intent and receipts.
global_findings.impact: Live/historical data can be pulled through repo sources, but the research workflow still lacks an obvious native VBT Data bridge that is easy, configured, and auditable.
global_findings.title: Data acquisition is split between repo provider stack and native VBT Data without a thin bridge

evidence: production_portfolio_runtime_policy native_surfaces names only vectorbtpro.portfolio.Portfolio.from_signals as constructor
portfolio_runtime_policy validator rejects any constructor except from_signals
VBT MCP shows Portfolio.from_orders, from_order_func, from_def_order_func, from_optimizer, in_outputs, last_state, allocations, records, stacking, and resampling
global_findings.fix_direction: Keep current replay default, but add versioned portfolio_research_modes for from_orders/from_order_func/from_optimizer with PIT/input/receipt constraints.
global_findings.impact: Legitimate portfolio research routes are policy-invalid even when they are native VBT Pro surfaces and could be quarantined as research modes.
global_findings.title: Portfolio policy incorrectly narrows native research to Portfolio.from_signals

evidence: Optimization lane has 19 strong unclassified helpers and 36 operator-required VBT642 records
Private research sweep query/build/run helpers appear in strong Optimization matches with helper_manifest_missing and script_surface_policy_unclassified findings
VBT MCP shows PortfolioOptimizer allocation routes that are not yet mapped into repo-owned modes
global_findings.fix_direction: Classify private research sweep helpers, add read-only query modes, and only then activate optimizer-backed experiment modes.
global_findings.impact: Optimization work is possible but too policy-noisy to automate confidently.
global_findings.title: Optimization and private research sweep helpers are operationally central but unclassified

evidence: Intelligence strong top scripts include vectorbtpro private docs high-value index builders/validators and MCP validators with unclassified policy state
VBT642 Intelligence area is mostly thin_wrapper_needed, not runtime execution
Docs/MCP retrieval is critical for avoiding hand-rolled VBT code but is mixed with runtime/model/probe risk flags
global_findings.fix_direction: Create explicit read-only MCP/docs query class, generator class, and runtime-probe class in helper manifest and script policy.
global_findings.impact: Agents can find official VBT docs, but the repo does not make that workflow cleanly distinguishable from runtime or model execution.
global_findings.title: MCP/private-docs Intelligence helpers need first-class read-only/generator classification

evidence: Massive live promotion loads VBT_DOTENV_PATH and validates secret redaction, so its broad network credential hit is not a missing-credential-route proof
NIM probe policy declares VBT_DOTENV_PATH, accepted secret env vars, and redaction
Real issue remains default network/write/probe intent and whether --summary-only is read-only
global_findings.fix_direction: Teach scanners to recognize repo-owned credential/redaction evidence and emit separate findings for live/probe/write intent.
global_findings.impact: False P1 noise can distract from the actual fix: explicit live/probe/write modes and read-only summaries.
global_findings.title: Network credential-route scanner has false positives that hide the real live/probe cracks

deep_drilldown_notes: Native Splitter supports purged and walk-forward split construction, but train-fold lineage helpers are partly archived while active analysis helpers still carry summary-write risks.
The lane needs an explicit active split/analysis helper route that cites Splitter/PurgedWalkForwardCV authority without depending on archived status.
VBT Data exposes download/fetch/pull/update plus local/SQL/DuckDB/ArcticDB/parquet IO, but all 52 Data-lane VBT642 records are P0 runtime-sensitive reference-only with operator decision required.

Repo provider/materializer helpers exist and some are clean P4, but the bridge that lets research acquire live/historical data through repo-owned policy while cataloging native VBT Data affordances is incomplete.

IndicatorFactory has broad native construction/register/list/find affordances. The repo has many VBT tool validators, but the checkpoint shows helper-manifest lag and summary-write risk across the strong indicator set.
The immediate crack is not indicator coverage; it is authority hygiene around which validators are active, generated, and read-only.
MCP/private-docs helper scripts are among the highest-scoring strong matches, but several are unclassified or logical archive, leaving official-doc retrieval operationally important but policy-noisy.
The broad network scanner overstates some credential issues; the real crack is separating read-only docs/MCP indexing from runtime execution and model/probe surfaces.
PortfolioOptimizer exposes allocation and optimizer constructors, including pypfopt/riskfolio/universal/random/uniform routes, while private research sweep/index helpers remain unclassified.
Optimization has 36 operator-required VBT642 records and 66 thin-wrapper-needed records; the research workflow should classify private sweep helpers before adding more optimizer execution.

The checkpoint shows only 12 strong Overview helpers, but v2_repo_index.py is one of them and carries missing exact refs, multi-risk flags, hard-coded runtime review literals, and unresolved schema-id-like strings.
The overview lane should be stabilized by separating status/read-only checks from generator receipts and by classifying script import validators in the helper manifest/policy.

ReturnsAccessor and Portfolio provide native return/risk metrics, rolling metrics, records, stats, drawdowns, plots, and resampling. The repo uses some stats extraction but still has heavy summary-write and unclassified helper noise.
The performance lane should define native metric-source precedence so helpers do not mix custom metric rows, portfolio.stats(), and ReturnsAccessor metrics ad hoc.

The policy and validator currently make from_signals the only valid constructor, but MCP confirms native Portfolio supports from_orders, from_order_func, from_def_order_func, from_optimizer, in_outputs, last_state, stacking, resampling, and rich record surfaces.
This is the sharpest incorrect policy crack: it protects the current replay path, but it also makes legitimate research routes policy-invalid until explicit configured modes are added.
The lane matches almost every script; therefore productivity quality is dominated by manifest/policy/index hygiene, not missing capability.
Self-invalidating tracked generated outputs, summary-only write semantics, and unclassified current scripts are the highest-leverage cracks.

index_self_invalidation.finding: Rebuild/validate write receipts and summaries that are themselves tracked/indexed; immediate status can go stale on output hash changes.
Script-import rebuild writes manifest, summary, receipt, and checkpoint; summary-only only shrinks output printing, not write behavior after rebuild.
Freshness treats dirty tracked generated artifacts as stale, which is correct for integrity but noisy when the index generator changes its own tracked outputs.

network_default_write_review.finding: Public NVIDIA docs URL and default committed manifest output are hard-coded; main always fetches and writes with no --write/--dry-run distinction.
--summary-only exists, but the command still writes a tmp report by default.
Credential routing/redaction is present, so the broad scanner network credential hit is a likely false positive for Massive; the remaining crack is write/live-intent semantics.
HTTP and Docker probing are real runtime surfaces; env redaction is present but probe/live intent should be explicit and auditable.
NIM credential policy uses VBT_DOTENV_PATH and secret redaction, so credential-route findings should distinguish missing route from intentionally routed live probes.

portfolio_native_surface_narrowing.finding: The policy only names Portfolio.from_signals plus records/stats/drawdowns surfaces, while native VBT portfolio supports order-function, orders, optimizer, in-output, last-state, and allocation workflows.
Validator hard-requires portfolio_constructor == vectorbtpro.portfolio.Portfolio.from_signals, making broader native construction routes policy-invalid until policy/schema are expanded.

Runtime calls Portfolio.from_signals and extracts orders/trades/stats; it does not currently expose native from_orders/from_order_func/from_optimizer/in_outputs/last_state routes as configured research modes.

Data.native_summary: Class for downloading, updating, managing, aligning, resampling, and storing data from a data source.

IndicatorFactory.native_summary: Factory for creating and registering indicators from expressions, custom functions, TA/TALib/pandas-ta/technical/WQA101 libraries.

Portfolio.native_summary: Class for simulating a portfolio and measuring performance; built through from_* class methods and record/metric accessors.

PortfolioOptimizer.native_summary: Allocation generator surface for portfolio optimization workflows.

Records.native_summary: Structured record mapping, readable conversion, coverage, resampling, stacking, and field access surface.

ReturnsAccessor.native_summary: Return and risk metric accessor with rolling variants and benchmark-aware measures.

Splitter.native_summary: Native split construction and diagnostics, including purged, rolling, expanding, sklearn, coverage, overlap, and split-and-apply helpers.

mcp_native_capability_evidence.source: VectorBT Pro MCP resolve_refnames/get_attrs/find; private docs endpoint referenced only as credentialed_vectorbtpro_api_docs_endpoint

next_audit_checkpoint_actions.expected_output: JSON plan separating pure status/query from write/build modes and naming exact scripts to patch first
updated helper/catalog/policy surfaces or generated reconciliation manifest; no runtime behavior change required
versioned JSON policy and thin helper design for live/historical acquisition with receipts
next_audit_checkpoint_actions.target: Data lane native Data fetch/update/storage plus repo source_registry/provider roles

next_audit_checkpoint_actions.expected_output: additive research-mode policy allowing native from_orders/from_order_func/from_optimizer under explicit PIT and receipt constraints

highest_leverage_fix_order: Separate read-only summary/status paths from generator/write paths across indexers, validators, and query helpers.
Refresh helper manifest and script surface usage policy for all current repo-assist scripts before adding more automation.
Add explicit configured research modes for native VBT Portfolio constructors beyond from_signals.
Add a repo-owned VBT Data acquisition bridge that maps live/historical data pulls into production_io_authority/source_registry/data_estate outputs.
Classify MCP/private-docs and private-research sweep helpers as active/query/build/run surfaces with write/live intent flags.
Refine scanners to distinguish credential-route gaps from routed live probes with redaction evidence.
